# terrible_netapp_ontap_na_ontap_ndmp (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `vserver` (String) Name of the vserver.

### Optional

- `abort_on_disk_error` (Boolean) Enable abort on disk error.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `authtype` (String) Authentication type.
- `backup_log_enable` (Boolean) Enable backup log.
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `data_port_range` (String) Data port range. Modification not supported for data Vservers.
- `debug_enable` (Boolean) Enable debug.
- `debug_filter` (String) Debug filter.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `dump_detailed_stats` (Boolean) Enable logging of VM stats for dump.
- `dump_logical_find` (String) Enable logical find for dump.
- `enable` (Boolean) Enable NDMP on vserver.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `fh_dir_retry_interval` (Number) FH throttle value for dir.
- `fh_node_retry_interval` (Number) FH throttle value for node.
- `ignore_ctime_enabled` (Boolean) Ignore ctime.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `is_secure_control_connection_enabled` (Boolean) Is secure control connection enabled.
- `ndmp_user` (String) The name of the NDMP user. This field cannot be specified in a PATCH method.
- `offset_map_enable` (Boolean) Enable offset map.
- `per_qtree_exclude_enable` (Boolean) Enable per qtree exclusion.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `preferred_interface_role` (String) Preferred interface role.
- `restore_vm_cache_size` (Number) Restore VM file cache size. Value range [4-1024]
- `secondary_debug_filter` (String) Secondary debug filter.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `tcpnodelay` (Boolean) Enable TCP nodelay.
- `tcpwinsize` (Number) TCP window size.
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
